name: Digital Hollywood Interactive Limited
summary: Digital Hollywood Interactive Limited, an investment holding company, publishes online games for China-based game developers in North America, Europe, the People's Republic of China, and internationally. The company develops, operates, and publishes various games primarily consisting of casual games, and mid-and hardcore games in web and mobile formats to various demographic user communities; and provides game redesign, optimization, marketing, distribution, monetization, payment support, and other user-related services. It also offers marketing and technical support services. The company was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.
